mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_product WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT p.* FROM sys_product p WHERE p.seller_id = #{sellerId} AND p.type = 'product' AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.status != '已售出' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM trade_order o WHERE o.product_id = p.id AND o.deleted = 0 AND o.status NOT IN ('已取消', '已删除') ) ORDER BY p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.* FROM sys_product p WHERE p.seller_id = #{sellerId} AND p.type = #{type} AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.status != '已售出' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM trade_order o WHERE o.product_id = p.id AND o.deleted = 0 AND o.status NOT IN ('已取消', '已删除') ) ORDER BY p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.* FROM sys_product p WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = '在售' AND p.type = 'product' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM trade_order o WHERE o.product_id = p.id AND o.deleted = 0 AND o.status IN ('待付款', '待发货', '待收货') ) ORDER BY p.view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.* FROM sys_product p WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = '在售' AND p.type = 'product' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM trade_order o WHERE o.product_id = p.id AND o.deleted = 0 AND o.status IN ('待付款', '待发货', '待收货') ) ORDER BY p.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.* FROM sys_product p WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = '在售' AND p.type = 'product' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM trade_order o WHERE o.product_id = p.id AND o.deleted = 0 AND o.status IN ('待付款', '待发货', '待收货') ) ORDER BY p.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_product ( title, description, price, original_price, images, category_id, sub_category, `condition`, status, view_count, favorite_count, seller_id, location, is_negotiable, tags, deleted, create_time, update_time, type, service_type, price_unit ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{description}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{images}, #{categoryId}, #{subCategory}, #{condition}, '在售', 0, 0, #{sellerId}, #{location}, #{isNegotiable}, #{tags}, 0, NOW(), NOW(), #{type}, #{serviceType}, #{priceUnit} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_product
title = #{title}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, original_price = #{originalPrice}, images = #{images}, category_id = #{categoryId}, sub_category = #{subCategory}, `condition` = #{condition}, status = #{status}, location = #{location}, is_negotiable = #{isNegotiable}, tags = #{tags}, sold_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_product SET status = #{status}, sold_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_product SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_product SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE sys_product SET view_count = FLOOR(50 + RAND() * 1500) WHERE deleted = 0 AND ( (type = 'product' AND status = '在售') OR (type = 'service' AND status IN ('可用', '上架', '在售')) ) AND (view_count IS NULL OR view_count = 0)
mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS id, p.title AS title, p.price AS price, p.type AS itemType, SUBSTRING_INDEX( SUBSTRING_INDEX(p.images, '"', 2), '"', -1 ) AS coverImage FROM sys_product p WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = '在售' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM trade_order o WHERE o.product_id = p.id AND o.deleted = 0 AND o.status IN ('待付款', '待发货', '待收货') ) AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY p.view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.* FROM sys_product p WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND ( (p.status = '在售' AND p.type = 'product') OR (p.status IN ('可用','上架','在售') AND p.type = 'service') ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM trade_order o WHERE o.product_id = p.id AND o.deleted = 0 AND o.status IN ('待付款', '待发货', '待收货') )
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY
p.price ASC p.price DESC p.favorite_count DESC, p.view_count DESC p.create_time DESC p.create_time DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_product p WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND ( (p.status = '在售' AND p.type = 'product') OR (p.status IN ('可用','上架','在售') AND p.type = 'service') ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM trade_order o WHERE o.product_id = p.id AND o.deleted = 0 AND o.status IN ('待付款', '待发货', '待收货') )
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
